steps.title: Locate hazelnuts on the graph
steps.content: The legend identifies hazelnuts as the black bars. To find the season when hazelnuts reached their highest price, compare the height of the black bars across all four seasons from 2016/17 to 2019/20.

steps.title: Read the values and identify the peak
steps.content:
The black bars show hazelnut prices at approximately \$1.40 in 2016/17, \$1.25 in 2017/18, \$0.95 in 2018/19, and \$1.00 in 2019/20.

The 2016/17 season has the tallest black bar, representing the highest price for hazelnuts.

The other three seasons all show lower values. That matches choice B — B is correct.
